Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Monique Eginli, esq. (310-860-0770) of Sherigerian & Associates, Inc. for Plaintiff Derrick Sutherland via Court Call.
Antonio C. Raimundo, esq. (415-394-9400 x.5426) of Jackson Lewis PC for Defendants Baart Programs, Inc., et al via Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs BAART PROGRAMS, INC., ADDICTION RESEARCH AND TREATMENT, INC., BAYMARK HEALTH SERVICES, TERESA FLEMING and NADINE ROBBINS-LAURENT's Motion To Compel Arbitration.

Defendants BAART Programs, Inc., Addiction Research and Treatment, Inc., Baymark Health Services, Teresa Fleming, and Nadine Robbins-Laurent's motion to compel arbitration is granted and the action is stayed pending the conclusion of arbitration proceedings of all causes of action stated in plaintiff Derrick Sutherland's complaint. (see word minutes for full details) (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
